name: Teriyaki Chicken Wings
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400°F (200°C).
2. In a large bowl, mix together the Teriyaki Marinade & Sauce, dry sherry, honey, vegetable oil, dry mustard, ground ginger, and garlic powder.
3. Place the chicken wings in a single layer on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper or aluminum foil.
4. Pour the marinade mixture over the chicken wings, ensuring they are evenly coated.
5. Bake the chicken wings for 35-40 minutes, flipping them halfway through the cooking time, until they are golden brown and crispy.
6. Remove from the oven and let cool slightly before serving.
